sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61926" key="la=os2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾶος</orth>, irreg. gen. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λᾶας</foreign>. <sense n="II" id="n61926.0" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾶος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stone</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λᾶας</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
